title: pilosella glaucescens subsp. doroghensis
intro: Pilosella glaucescens subsp. doroghensis is a subspecies of the Pilosella glaucescens plant, belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae), and is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to provide several health benefits, such as relieving digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and boosting the immune system. Pilosella glaucescens subsp. doroghensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a popular ingredient in traditional herbal remedies.
